ab: Abi, ulra u i ruma’?
en: Abi, are you home?

ab: ulra ku i ruma’, alra usavak.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Abi, ulra u i ruma’?
en: Abi, are you home?

ab: uniyan i ruma’ i Abi, i Imay ku, eman nanu ngangai kantaw? nu muruma’ kuwa umalray lra.
ch: B:Abi不在家耶，我是Imay，有什麼事嗎？回來我會轉告Abi。
en: Abi is not at home. I am Imay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: i eman mu?
en: Who are you?

ab: imu, i Avas ku za i Abi, truwalray mi ziya.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Avas和Abi，幫我們開門。
en: Grandma, we are Avas and Abi, please open the door for us.

ab: i eman u?
en: Who is it?

ab: i Buya ku, zuwa ku maya’a kani Umang.
en: I am Buya, I am here for Umang.

ab: imu, zuwa ku mena’uwa kaninu.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: sawariyan u lra ’azi zuwa, zi salaw ku sare’ez kaninu.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Abi, zuwa ku muzazangiya kaninu.
en: Abi, I am here to play with you.

ab: pakunamun musavak, sawriyan ku za mengangara kaninu.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: ninku sinalem inia na vurasi, zi talrami mekan!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看！
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: kasa tavu’ ini na vurasi.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: alamu! ninku isalem ini na inaekan na vuwa’, talrami mekan.
ch: A:過來！這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: kasa tavu’ ini na inaekan na vuwa’.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: alra kayan! inia na kudumu mu maw ninku isalem na ’azi pinutremelan talrami mekan!
ch: A:請坐！這是我種的有機玉米吃看看！
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: wa! salaw tavu’ ini na kudumu.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: aekan u za vartenuk?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: aku karuwa mekan za vartenuk, mekana ku za lingo maruwa.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: aekan u za walru?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: ai, kasa ku sahar.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: ku kulitranay u za inaekan na vuwa’ pakan kaninu.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: lrayuan, salaw mizanum ini na inaekan na vuwa’.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: kuwa alakanay u za zanum pa’aw mu.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: lrayuan.
en: Thank you.

ab: kasazuyu mekan, sazu ku tinusasiyaw.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: wa! kasa lringulr zi aresasiyaw.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: kasazuyu mekan, sazu ziya i kania.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: ’azi kuy kaaira yi!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: kasazuyu mekan, sazu ziya i kani.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: sazu lra ku inekan, ’azi ku lra kararuwa mekan.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
